evals.name: cicd_pipeline_design
evals.prompt: Design the CI/CD pipeline for our microservices platform
expectations: Covers commit, acceptance, and production stages
Includes branching strategy recommendation
Addresses artifact management with immutable builds
Defines environment promotion with same artifact through all envs

evals.name: shift_left_security
evals.prompt: Integrate security into our delivery pipeline with SAST and SCA
expectations: Covers SAST, SCA, container scanning, and secrets scanning
Recommends specific tools for each security gate
Defines blocking vs warning thresholds per gate
Includes IaC scanning for infrastructure misconfigurations

evals.name: supply_chain_security
evals.prompt: Set up SBOM generation and artifact signing for our build pipeline
expectations: Covers SBOM generation in SPDX or CycloneDX format
Includes artifact signing with cosign or sigstore
Addresses dependency verification and pinned versions
Covers build reproducibility and immutable build agents

evals.name: dora_metrics
evals.prompt: Help us measure and improve our DORA metrics
expectations: Defines all 4 DORA metrics with targets
Covers pipeline observability and bottleneck detection
Includes deployment tracking and incident correlation
Recommends specific measurement and improvement strategies

evals.name: compliance_automation
evals.prompt: Automate compliance for our regulated healthcare application
expectations: Covers policy-as-code with OPA or Kyverno
Includes audit trail with immutable logging
Addresses evidence collection for compliance audits
Defines risk-based deployment gates (low/medium/high)
